author: robthefivenine
description: Add live GDScript syntax highlighting to code block.

manifest.author: RobTheFiveNine
manifest.description: Add live GDScript syntax highlighting to code blocks.
manifest.name: GDScript Syntax Highlighting

name: GDScript Syntax Highlighting

releases.author: RobTheFiveNine
releases.description:
**Improvements**
- Add highlighting of function calls both as standalone calls and as object members

**Fixes**
- Stop highlighting of keywords in variable names (such as `or` in `color`)
- Ensure class names appearing after the `is` keyword are highlighted as such

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/RobTheFiveNine/obsidian-gdscript/compare/1.0.3...1.1.0

releases.author: RobTheFiveNine
releases.description:
**Improvements**
- Adds two case variations for the syntax identifier, allowing users to use `GDScript` and `GDscript` after the opening backticks

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/RobTheFiveNine/obsidian-gdscript/compare/1.0.2...1.0.3

releases.author: RobTheFiveNine
releases.description:
**Bug Fixes**
- Add `await` as a recognised keyword
